shadows.name: pata-premium
shadows.purpose: Used for floating panels and modals to convey depth.

motion.name: pata-spring
motion.purpose: Signature bouncy entry for panels and modals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #FE8F15; color: #000; padding: 10px 18px; font-family: 'Fraiche', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; border-radius: 50px; border: 2px solid #000; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(254, 143, 21, 0.3); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #00BBB4; color: #000; padding: 10px 18px; font-family: 'Fraiche', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; border-radius: 50px; border: 2px solid #000; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 187, 180, 0.3); }

components.name: Pet Tab
components.description: Tab for switching between pets in the dashboard.
components.css: .ds-pet-tab { background: #F0F2F5; border-radius: 50px; padding: 12px 28px; font-weight: 900; color: #666; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-pet-tab.ds-active { background: #00BBB4; color: #FFF; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 187, 180, 0.3); }

components.name: Glass Panel
components.css: .ds-glass-panel { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-radius: 35px; padding: 40px; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: A premium design system that transforms a complex registration process into an exclusive 'club' experience. The aesthetic balances high-energy accents with a calming, trustworthy base.
keyCharacteristics: Glassmorphic Depth: Surfaces use semi-transparent backgrounds and backdrop blurs.
Round Confidence: Extreme border-radii (50px) on inputs and buttons.
Vibrant Precision: Saturated colors used strategically for primary actions.

rules.name: The Rare Accent Rule
rules.body: Action Orange is used on ≤10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Floating Panel Rule
rules.body: All primary interaction areas float above the background with a soft shadow and subtle blur.

dos: Do use OKLCH for dynamic color variations.
Do use Fraiche for all major numeric indicators.
Do keep buttons consistently rounded at 50px.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders as status indicators.
Don't mix more than two Action Orange elements on the same viewport.
